## Results

| Metric | Start | End | Gained |
|--------|-------|-----|--------|
| **Hitpoints XP** | 980 | **26,947** | **+25,967 XP** |
| **HP Level** | 10 | 47 | +37 levels |

| **Strength XP** | 0 | 72,900 | (combat style) |

The script:
1. Equipped bronze sword + wooden shield
2. Set combat style to **Aggressive** (trains Strength) 
3. Continuously attacked Rats and Men near the spawn area
4. Ate food when HP dropped low

Gained **25,967 HP XP** in ~10 minutes through legitimate combat.
